success_evidence: expected AWS account matches STS caller identity
Terraform state bucket exists and versioning is enabled
plan role can read state and acquire the state lock
stages.rollback: No rollback. No resource mutation is permitted.

success_evidence: saved Terraform plan and JSON representation
no delete or replace action
no 0.0.0.0/0 ingress introduced
private subnets retain internal load balancer tags
stages.rollback: Discard the plan. No apply is performed by this stage.

success_evidence: ECR, S3, SQS and runtime Secret changes are enumerated
no static AWS credentials are introduced
optional production adapters remain disabled
stop_conditions: runtime Secret value material appears in evidence
stages.rollback: Discard the plan. No apply is performed by this stage.

success_evidence: RDS, Cognito and network dependencies are enumerated
RDS-managed password remains the credential source
database replacement is absent
stop_conditions: credential value copied into Terraform evidence
stages.rollback: Discard the plan. Database replacement requires a separate migration and restore plan.

success_evidence: EKS control plane, node group and IRSA changes are enumerated
backend, External Secrets and Load Balancer Controller identities remain separate
private backend origin security group remains CloudFront-scoped
stop_conditions: IAM wildcard expansion outside the pinned controller policy
backend origin security group becomes public
stages.rollback: Discard the plan. Cluster replacement is not approved in the normal deployment path.

success_evidence: immutable backend image tag and digest
ECR repository matches Terraform output
source commit and image digest are recorded
stop_conditions: latest tag used as deployment identity
image vulnerability or container health gate fails
stages.rollback: Retain the previous known-good digest and redeploy that digest if rollout validation fails.

success_evidence: AWS Load Balancer Controller and External Secrets versions are recorded
ServiceAccount annotations match Terraform IRSA outputs
ExternalSecret target contains exactly nine runtime keys
stop_conditions: controller CRDs or webhooks are unhealthy
database password appears outside the RDS-managed Secret mapping
stages.rollback: Restore the previous Helm release revision and suspend reconciliation before removing generated resources.

success_evidence: Deployment uses the reviewed image digest
readiness and liveness probes pass
database, Cognito and S3 runtime checks pass
stages.rollback: Roll back to the previous ReplicaSet and known-good image digest; do not reverse database migrations without a reviewed restore procedure.

success_evidence: internal ALB exists in private subnets
targets are healthy Pod IPs
listener exposes /api only
direct public access is absent
stop_conditions: security group source differs from CloudFront origin-facing prefix list
stages.rollback: Remove or revert the Ingress and controller reconciliation while leaving the backend ClusterIP service available for internal diagnosis.

success_evidence: CloudFront VPC origin resolves the approved internal ALB ARN
private S3 OAC policy remains distribution-scoped
API caching remains disabled
no custom error response replaces API errors
stages.rollback: Discard the plan. No frontend infrastructure mutation is performed by this stage.

success_evidence: frontend build file and digest inventory
S3 sync destination
limited invalidation ID and completion status
CloudFront entrypoint smoke result
stop_conditions: API response is replaced with HTML
stages.rollback: Re-sync the previous verified build and issue a new limited invalidation for mutable entrypoints.

success_evidence: authenticated upload, project/file registration, analysis and Terraform retrieval
public project read path
401/403/404 API errors remain JSON
one controlled failure and recovery scenario with timestamps and evidence
stop_conditions: recovery cannot be explained by layer-specific evidence
stages.rollback: Return traffic to the previous verified frontend and backend digests, then preserve evidence before cleanup.
